line_1.baseline_question_used: What clinical trials for colorectal cancer have at least three arms and use a multikinase inhibitor as the control?
line_1.baseline_pred_sql: SELECT "NCT", "PubMed ID", "Trial name", "Author", "Year", "Trial phase", "Number of arms", "Total sample size", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Control regimen", "Type of control", "Lines of treatment", "Clincal setting in relation to surgery", "Primary endpoint", "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?", "Secondary endpoint", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion", "Type of follow-up given", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control", "Type of therapy", "Control arm", "Clinical setting", "Included in MA" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'colorectal cancer' AND "Number of arms" >= 3 AND "Type of control" = 'multikinase inhibitor'
line_1.baseline_model_raw_sql_output: SELECT "NCT", "PubMed ID", "Trial name", "Author", "Year", "Trial phase", "Number of arms", "Total sample size", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Control regimen", "Type of control", "Lines of treatment", "Clincal setting in relation to surgery", "Primary endpoint", "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?", "Secondary endpoint", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion", "Type of follow-up given", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control", "Type of therapy", "Control arm", "Clinical setting", "Included in MA" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'colorectal cancer' AND "Number of arms" >= 3 AND "Type of control" = 'multikinase inhibitor'
baseline_answer_columns: Clincal setting in relation to surgery
Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?
Is any other biomarker used for inclusion
Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall
Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx
Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control

line_50.baseline_question_used: What trials of Pembrolizumab for Gastric/GEJ cancer have a follow-up duration of more than 21 months?
